name: Helios Trice Megistus
name_jp: ヘリオス・トリス・メギストス
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Helios Duo Megistus". This card's ATK/DEF become the number of banished monsters x 300. After this card attacks, if your opponent controls a monster, this card can make a second attack in a row. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was destroyed by battle and sent there this turn: You can Special Summon this card, and it gains 500 ATK/DEF.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Helios Duo Megistus". This card's ATK/DEF become the number of banished monsters x 300. After this card attacks, if your opponent controls a monster, this card can make a second attack in a row. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was destroyed by battle and sent there this turn: You can Special Summon this card, and it gains 500 ATK/DEF.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

jp_sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! Ultimate Masters: World Championship Tournament 2006 Game Guide promotional card

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
